chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2237 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 28.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ali Talpur, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh The present petition assails a private correspondence between the Manager of Chartered Accountant Firm and the Board of Revenue. Prima facie there is no impugned order herein, however, this petition has been perpetuated for the last six years. Petition found to be prima facie misconceived and frivolous hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
